attempts to use airodump‑ng, hcxdumptool, tcpdump, and raw‑socket scans cause the shell to reset. Bluetooth scanning also fails to discover any devices. The network interface wlan1 does not show an IP address or routing information, indicating it is likely still in monitor mode or otherwise not configured for normal client operation. Without a functional network interface or discovered services, further exploitation of the phone’s Quick Share feature is not possible in the current environment.</done>
